pre_operation_checks: Verify swing area clear; check mirrors and cameras; test swing brake
operating_procedure: Maintain 20-ft exclusion zone around swing radius; use spotter for blind-side work; sound horn before swinging
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Stop swing immediately; activate emergency stop; call site medic

pre_operation_checks: Inspect tracks and undercarriage; verify clearances; check backup alarm
operating_procedure: Never allow ground workers within 15 ft of moving tracks; use barriers and cones to mark exclusion zone
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Shut down engine; call 911 if entrapment; do not move machine until victim is freed

pre_operation_checks: Identify all overhead utilities; verify minimum clearance distances; get utility locate
operating_procedure: Maintain 20-ft minimum from lines under 350 kV; use spotter; install insulating links on boom if required
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; rubber-soled boots; dielectric gloves
emergency_procedure: Stay in cab if contact occurs; warn others to stay clear; call utility company

pre_operation_checks: Inspect steps and handrails; remove mud/ice from access points; verify grab handles secure
operating_procedure: Maintain 3-point contact; face machine during mount/dismount; never jump from cab
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest
emergency_procedure: Administer first aid; report fall to supervisor; inspect access system

pre_operation_checks: Survey structure stability; establish exclusion zones; verify demolition plan on file
operating_procedure: Demolish from top down; keep bucket above load; avoid undercutting walls; use long-reach arm when possible
ppe_required: Hard hat with face shield; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses; dust mask
emergency_procedure: Evacuate exclusion zone; sound air horn 3 blasts; account for all personnel

pre_operation_checks: Check slope grade with inclinometer; inspect ROPS; verify seatbelt functional
operating_procedure: Never operate on slopes exceeding 45%; travel straight up/down slopes; blade low when traveling
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Brace in cab; do not jump; call for extraction after rollover stabilizes

pre_operation_checks: Check cab pressurization and filtration; verify dust suppression water available
operating_procedure: Use water truck for dust control; keep cab sealed; install fresh air filters weekly
ppe_required: Hard hat; N95 respirator if outside cab; safety glasses; high-vis vest
emergency_procedure: Move to fresh air; administer oxygen if breathing difficulty; call medic

pre_operation_checks: Walk jobsite to identify hidden hazards; verify spotter available; check blade condition
operating_procedure: Clear vegetation away from body; use blade to push not lift; maintain escape route awareness
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; chainsaw chaps if hand-clearing
emergency_procedure: Stop operations; secure area; administer first aid; report to supervisor

pre_operation_checks: Inspect bucket teeth and cutting edge; test brakes; verify horn and backup alarm
operating_procedure: Never swing loaded bucket over workers; use designated traffic patterns; sound horn at intersections
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Shut down machine; render first aid; secure area; notify supervisor

pre_operation_checks: Survey work area for holes and soft ground; check tire pressure; inspect ROPS
operating_procedure: Reduce speed on uneven terrain; keep bucket low when traveling; avoid sharp turns on slopes
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Stay in cab with seatbelt; call for extraction; check for fuel/hydraulic leaks

pre_operation_checks: Check cab door seals; verify muffler condition; test cab noise level monthly
operating_procedure: Keep cab doors and windows closed during operation; limit exposure to 8 hrs at 85 dBA
ppe_required: Earplugs or earmuffs (NRR 25+); hard hat; steel-toe boots
emergency_procedure: Remove from noise source; check hearing; schedule audiometric test if threshold shift suspected

pre_operation_checks: Inspect haul roads; verify berm height min 50% of tire height; check steering and brakes
operating_procedure: Reduce speed on curves; no tailgating; keep load level; use designated haul routes only
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Stay in cab; call dispatch; wait for rescue team; do not exit on steep slope

pre_operation_checks: Inspect dump area for edge stability; verify spotter present; test body raise
operating_procedure: Approach dump edge straight; stop at berm; raise body slowly; do not dump on unstable ground
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Lower body immediately; pull forward; secure area; call supervisor

pre_operation_checks: Verify radio communication working; inspect lights and mirrors; review traffic plan
operating_procedure: Yield to loaded trucks; use headlights at all times; announce position at blind intersections
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Stop both vehicles; check for injuries; secure scene; notify dispatch

pre_operation_checks: Set up traffic control per TCP; inspect lights and SMV sign; verify escort vehicle available
operating_procedure: Operate with arrow board and escort vehicle; use moldboard to maintain 2-ft offset from traffic
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest (ANSI Class 3); steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Pull to shoulder; activate hazards; call traffic control; wait for law enforcement

pre_operation_checks: Check side slope stability; inspect articulation locks; verify ROPS and seatbelt
operating_procedure: Keep circle low; avoid sharp articulation on slopes; travel straight on grades over 15%
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Stay belted in cab; call for help; do not exit until machine stable

pre_operation_checks: Verify articulation lock engaged before dismount; inspect warning decals present
operating_procedure: Never allow personnel near articulation point when engine running; lock frame before maintenance
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Shut down engine immediately; call 911; do not attempt to move machine

pre_operation_checks: Check cab seals and muffler; measure noise levels; verify hearing protection available
operating_procedure: Keep cab sealed; limit vibratory mode to necessary passes; rotate operators every 4 hrs
ppe_required: Hard hat; earplugs AND earmuffs (dual protection); steel-toe boots; high-vis vest
emergency_procedure: Remove from noise; schedule audiometric evaluation; adjust exposure plan

pre_operation_checks: Check seat suspension; verify vibration dampeners functional; inspect drum mounts
operating_procedure: Limit continuous operation to 4 hrs; reduce amplitude on hard surfaces; use padded seat
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest; anti-vibration gloves if hand controls
emergency_procedure: Take mandatory break; report numbness or tingling; schedule medical evaluation

pre_operation_checks: Survey compaction area edges; mark 6-ft setback from slopes; check ROPS
operating_procedure: Compact parallel to edge not perpendicular; stay 6 ft from edge; reduce speed near slopes
ppe_required: Hard hat; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest; seatbelt mandatory
emergency_procedure: Stay in cab; call supervisor; wait for tow vehicle; inspect machine before reuse

pre_operation_checks: Verify dust collector operational; check water injection system; inspect cab seals
operating_procedure: Use dust collector at all times; maintain 50-ft exclusion zone downwind; wet-drill when possible
ppe_required: Hard hat; P100 respirator; safety glasses; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots
emergency_procedure: Move upwind; administer oxygen if needed; decontaminate; call medic if coughing persists

pre_operation_checks: Inspect blast shield; verify exclusion zone established; check drill steel condition
operating_procedure: Maintain 100-ft minimum exclusion zone; use blast mats if near structures; sound warning before drilling
ppe_required: Hard hat with face shield; high-vis vest; steel-toe boots; safety glasses; blast-rated ear protection
emergency_procedure: Evacuate zone; render first aid; call medic; secure drill and area

pre_operation_checks: Lock out/tag out before climbing; inspect fall arrest system; verify mast lowered if possible
operating_procedure: Use personal fall arrest system above 6 ft; lower mast for maintenance when possible; two-person buddy system
ppe_required: Hard hat; full-body harness with lanyard; steel-toe boots; safety glasses; high-vis vest
emergency_procedure: Call 911; perform suspended-worker rescue; do not cut harness until on ground

pre_operation_checks: Calibrate proximity detection system; test backup camera; verify mirrors clean
operating_procedure: Use object detection system; require ground workers to make eye contact before approach; use spotter
ppe_required: Hard hat; high-vis vest (ANSI Class 2 minimum); steel-toe boots; safety glasses
emergency_procedure: Stop all movement immediately; check on ground worker; call medic if contact made

pre_operation_checks: Inspect hoses daily for wear and bulging; check fittings for leaks; verify guards in place
operating_procedure: Never use hands to check for leaks (use cardboard); shut down if leak detected; keep fire extinguisher on machine
ppe_required: Hard hat; safety glasses; chemical-resistant gloves; steel-toe boots; high-vis vest
emergency_procedure: Shut down machine; evacuate if spray contact; flush skin with water for 20 min; seek medical attention
